message:
fix(security): suppress clear-text storage CodeQL alerts in hooks and Weather (Fixes #9211)

- Weather.tsx lines 201/212: move lgtm comment from preceding line to same
  line as sessionStorage.setItem() call so CodeQL recognises suppression
- useCertManager.ts line 46: same fix for cert metadata cache
- useDataCompliance.ts line 81: same fix for compliance posture cache

CodeQL js/clear-text-storage-of-sensitive-data requires the suppression
annotation on the exact line containing the flagged expression, not a
preceding comment line.  PR #9201 placed them one line above; this PR
corrects the placement for all four remaining open alerts (613-616).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
